/usr/bin/c++ -g CMakeFiles/vulkanTriangle.dir/Engine/Interface/gui.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vulkanTriangle.dir/Engine/JRenderer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vulkanTriangle.dir/Engine/Renderer/InterfaceSystem.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vulkanTriangle.dir/Engine/Renderer/RenderTarget.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vulkanTriangle.dir/Engine/Renderer/RenderingSystem.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vulkanTriangle.dir/Engine/VulkanCore/buffer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vulkanTriangle.dir/Engine/VulkanCore/commandBuffer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vulkanTriangle.dir/Engine/VulkanCore/descriptor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vulkanTriangle.dir/Engine/VulkanCore/device.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vulkanTriangle.dir/Engine/VulkanCore/load_model.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vulkanTriangle.dir/Engine/VulkanCore/load_texture.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vulkanTriangle.dir/Engine/VulkanCore/pipeline.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vulkanTriangle.dir/Engine/VulkanCore/shaderModule.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vulkanTriangle.dir/Engine/VulkanCore/swapchain.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vulkanTriangle.dir/Engine/VulkanCore/window.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vulkanTriangle.dir/Engine/global.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vulkanTriangle.dir/Engine/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vulkanTriangle.dir/Engine/utils/utility.cpp.o -o vulkanTriangle  /lib64/libvulkan.so libimgui.a /lib64/libvulkan.so /usr/lib64/libglfw.so.3.4
